creator: simon@qxnitro.org
text:
We should certainly apply the patch to the port. We should probably
also double check that the patch is what we are actually running with
- but it probably is.

It is correct that users will not be able to do a portaudit based
vuxml test with default portaudit since people don't / won't have
access the private key. The docs should probably be updated to tell
you how to disable the signature check for these kind of tests.

Sorry, I don't currently have time to do any of this.
